name: CampaignOps: SLA Monitor
description: Find unresolved SLA events → compare now vs due_at → alert if due soon / overdue → escalate if needed

parameters.text: ={{ 'SLA Alert: ' + $json.overdue + ' overdue, ' + $json.due_soon + ' due soon. Worst: ' + $json.worst_overdue_minutes + ' min overdue.' }}

parameters.subject: URGENT: SLA Escalation Level 3
parameters.text: Lead {{ $json.lead_id }} has been overdue for {{ $json.minutes_overdue }} minutes. Escalation level: {{ $json.escalation_level }}. Immediate action required.
